purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Helian Xuedai high-ranking bear-clan multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem is locked. Do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Helian Xuedai crest, modern logo, large chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner.
must_have: Helian Xuedai must read as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female guard with a human face, not a bear-face beast head
human round face, round bear ears, bear-clan markings on cheeks and forehead, subtle white sideburn fur, deep-brown eyes with faint ice-blue cold light
high-ranking tribal guard, clean complete noble guard equipment, not low-ranking tribesperson
heavy guard scale: 2.02-2.1 m, 125-155 kg, broad shoulders, strong neck, heavy forearms, large hands, short claws
white bear fur mantle, silver-black bone-iron chest armor, ice-grey woven layer, dark brown leather abdomen guard, bronze bracers, jade clasp, red oath cord, tower shield, guard axe, ice-stud boots
distinct from Lu Mi: bear-clan heavy guard, not Frosthoof deer noble, not shaman, not deer-rider
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: bear-face beast head, animal muzzle, low-ranking tribesperson, redesigned Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem, new bear crest, personal crest, modern logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, flag, deer ears, deer antlers, deer markings, Frosthoof deer noble silhouette, Lu Mi costume clone, ordinary human wearing decorative bear-ear headband, cute bear mascot, full quadruped animal, generic elf princess, southern palace maid, sexy exposed costume, poor ragged shaman, torn dirty fur, beggar rags, full-body mud, monster horde, game orc camp, shaman bone flute focus, snow herb pouch focus, ice-blue ritual fire focus, high-saturation xianxia glow, blue-purple magic aura, large spell circle, attack magic, floating weapons, Qingming white official costume, Grey Wall soldier grey cloth, Zhaoming vermilion-blue formal robe, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Helian Xuedai from the series Severed Homeland. Use existing project character-board layout logic: top row three full-body states of the same person, lower rows with close-up detail panels and material swatches, no visible labels or captions. Helian Xuedai is a 24-year-old high-ranking white-bear-clan female guard, Lu Mi's close protector and clan ritual enforcer. Correct identity: she has a human face, not a bear face. She is a high-ranking tribal guard, not a low-ranking tribesperson. Her face is human and round, with a full round face shape, calm stern female expression, deep-brown eyes with faint ice-blue cold light, round bear ears with white outer fur and pale grey inner ear, subtle white sideburn fur, and bear-clan facial markings on cheeks and forehead. Do not give her a bear muzzle, animal snout, beast head, or full bear face. Body scale: 2.02 to 2.1 meters tall, 125 to 155 kg, visibly bigger than human guards and much broader than Lu Mi, but still dignified and high-ranking. Strong neck, broad shoulders, shield-like chest, heavy forearms, large hands, thick fingers, short claws visible only in details, powerful legs. Show the same Helian Xuedai in three continuous states: 1) high guard formal state, white bear fur heavy mantle over silver-black bone-iron chest armor, ice-grey thick woven underlayer, dark brown leather abdomen guard, bronze bracers, bone toggles, jade clasp, rawhide belt, red oath cord, bone-iron tower shield resting beside her, long-handled guard axe held low, formal protective posture; 2) snowline escort battle-ready state, fur mantle strapped down for movement, shield forward, guard axe ready, travel straps and gear visible, wide ice-stud boots planted in snow, stable heavy movement, compressed fur edges and snow grit but clean complete gear; 3) clan ritual boundary enforcer state, same human-round-face bear-clan guard body with added bone-gold armor edge, jade clasp chain, red oath cord, small wind-worn bonewood command token, formal blocking posture used to enforce ritual boundaries, not a shaman performance. Include lower detail panels: human round face with bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, deep-brown ice-lit eyes; bear ear and facial marking close-up; huge forearm and large hand with short claws; white bear fur mantle edge; silver-black bone-iron chest armor; bronze bracer, bone toggles, jade clasp, red oath cord; bone-iron tower shield with old scratches and bear-claw cuts as material marks, not a badge; long-handled guard axe or short breaching axe; wide ice-stud boot; material swatches of white bear fur, silver-black bone iron, black iron, bronze, dark brown leather, ice-grey thick weave, jade green, bonewood, dark red oath cord, snow dust. Badge rule: do not redesign the locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem. Do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Helian Xuedai crest, chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner. Use northern symbol language only as material reference for bonewood knots, bear-claw cuts, rawhide cord, oath cord, and small carved tokens. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic fur, bone-iron, leather, bronze, bone, jade, rawhide, snow, restrained cinematic lighting, production reference clarity. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: bear-face beast head, animal muzzle, low-ranking tribesperson, redesigned Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem, new bear crest, personal crest, modern logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, flag, deer ears, deer antlers, deer markings, Frosthoof deer noble silhouette, Lu Mi costume clone, ordinary human wearing decorative bear-ear headband, cute bear mascot, full quadruped animal, generic elf princess, southern palace maid, sexy exposed costume, poor ragged shaman, torn dirty fur, beggar rags, full-body mud, monster horde, game orc camp, shaman bone flute focus, snow herb pouch focus, ice-blue ritual fire focus, high-saturation xianxia glow, blue-purple magic aura, large spell circle, attack magic, floating weapons, Qingming white official costume, Grey Wall soldier grey cloth, Zhaoming vermilion-blue formal robe, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi
